name: v1.0.2 - LobsterAI Security Framework
body:
# 🎉 LobsterAI Security Framework v1.0.2

## ✨ What's New

- **Version bump**: 1.0.0 → 1.0.2
- **Documentation**: Updated deployment guide with improved security posture
- **RBAC**: Enhanced authorization module
- **Audit Integration**: Switched from shell script to native Python logger for better portability
- **Dependency Scanner**: Built-in vulnerability database for offline operation (no external API calls)
- **Security Hardening**: Reduced privilege requirements (no Administrator/root needed)

## 🔒 Security Enhancements

- Defense-in-depth architecture
- Pre-execution validation
- Runtime monitoring
- Post-execution sanitization
- Comprehensive audit trails
- Offline vulnerability scanning (avoids external API 451 errors)

## 📦 Distribution

- Python package: `pip install lobsterai-security-skill` (once published)
- Direct install: Copy `security` directory to `%APPDATA%\LobsterAI\SKILLs\`

## 📚 Documentation

- [README.md](https://github.com/stoneyhoo/lobsterai-security-skill/blob/main/README.md)
- [DEPLOYMENT.md](https://github.com/stoneyhoo/lobsterai-security-skill/blob/main/DEPLOYMENT.md)
- [TECHNICAL_DOCUMENTATION.md](https://github.com/stoneyhoo/lobsterai-security-skill/blob/main/TECHNICAL_DOCUMENTATION.md)
- [SKILL_MARKET_SUBMISSION.md](https://github.com/stoneyhoo/lobsterai-security-skill/blob/main/SKILL_MARKET_SUBMISSION.md)
- [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/stoneyhoo/lobsterai-security-skill/blob/main/SECURITY.md)

## 🧪 Testing

All 25 unit tests passing ✅

```
Ran 25 tests in 0.078s
OK
```

## 🔐 Official Release

This is an official LobsterAI security module maintained by the LobsterAI Security Team.

---

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stoneyhoo/lobsterai-security-skill/compare/v1.0.0...v1.0.2
